prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次依次约 16166→32661（断档）→23710→17519→17632，近 3 年（2023–2025）位次在 17500–23700 区间波动，2025 年基准约 17632 名，较 2024 年基本持平，整体呈企稳态势；该校在河南理科（物理类）招生计划：2021 年 98 人、2022 年 99 人、2023 年 99 人、2024 年 91 人、2025 年 96 人；2026 年计划大幅增至 123 人，较 2025 年扩招约 28%，扩招幅度显著，理论上可缓解竞争压力，使最低录取位次后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东华大学为 211 工程、国家双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升，从 2021 年第 81 位升至 2026 年第 72 位，排名稳步提升反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；该校近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度排名第 96，评价为「一般」，短视频平台曝光量处于中低水平，未出现报考关注度骤升信号；材料科学与工程获第五轮学科评估 A 级，纺织科学与工程为「双一流」建设学科，与该校招生专业中的材料类、纺织类、功能材料等直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子 信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与该校计算机类、电子信息类招生专业契合，推高相关专业竞争；生化环材、土木建筑类明显劝退，该校化学类、环境类、材料类等 专业受此影响热度偏低。河南省 2025 年物理类考生约 55.5 万人，2026 年全省总考生约 120 万（较 2025 年总考生约 90 万大幅增加），按历史比例估算物理类考生约 74 万，竞争显著加剧；东华大学位于上海市，对河南考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在河南招生占比约 1.6%–1.8%（2024–2025 年），属跨省招生中等水平，无特殊地域偏好信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2026 年大幅扩招（96→123 人）使位次后移、河南省考生规模显著增加使竞争加剧、学校软科排名持续上升增强吸引力等多重因素，扩招效应与竞争加剧效应相互对冲后，预计最低录取位次在 2025 年基准 17632 名基础上小幅后移。预测 2026 年最低位次约 20407 名，区间 19907–20907 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 16166 → 32661 (gap) → 23710 → 17519 → 17632. In the recent 3 years (2023–2025), rankings fluctuated within the 17500–23700 range, with the 2025 baseline around 17632, roughly flat compared to 2024, showing a stabilizing trend. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Henan: 98 in 2021, 99 in 2022, 99 in 2023, 91 in 2024, 96 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 123, an expansion of about 28% compared to 2025, which theoretically could ease competition and push the minimum admission ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Donghua University is a Project 211 and national Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese university ranking has been rising steadily, from 81st in 2021 to 72nd in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In recent years, its reputation has been stable, with no significant negative public opinion or admission gaps; its Douyin popularity ranks 96th, rated as 'average', with short video platform exposure at a medium-low level, showing no sudden surge in application attention. Materials Science and Engineering received an A grade in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, and Textile Science and Engineering is a 'Double First-Class' construction discipline, directly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Materials, Textiles, and Functional Materials, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, aligning with the university's Computer and Electronic Information enrollment majors, driving competition in related fields. Majors like Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials, and Civil Engineering are clearly discouraged, and the university's Chemistry, Environment, and Materials majors are affected by this lower popularity. In 2025, Henan had about 555,000 physics category candidates; in 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is about 1.2 million (significantly increased from about 900,000 in 2025), with physics category candidates estimated at about 740,000 based on historical proportions, intensifying competition. Donghua University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal to Henan candidates; its enrollment proportion in Henan is about 1.6%–1.8% (2024–2025), a medium level for cross-provincial enrollment, with no special regional preference signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (96→123) pushing rankings backward, the notable increase in Henan candidate numbers intensifying competition, and the university's rising Soft Science ranking enhancing attractiveness, the expansion effect and competition intensification effect offset each other. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 17632. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 20407, with a range of 19907–20907.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 20407, range 19907–20907. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. For rankings better than the lower limit (<19907), focus on competitive Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence. For rankings near the upper limit (>20907), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors such as Materials and Textiles, which are advantageous disciplines, while also considering mid-level Tier 2 majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2024–2025 年文科（历史类）最低位次依次约 3514→3030，2025 年较 2024 年前移约 484 名，呈缩招背景下竞争加剧、位次前移趋势；2025 年基准约 3030 名；该校在河南文科（历史类）招生计划：2024 年 10 人、2025 年 10 人；2026 年计划大幅增至 20 人，较 2025 年扩招 100%，扩招幅度极大，理论上显著缓解竞争压力，使最低录取位次明显后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东华大学为 211、双一流，软科排名从 2021 年第 81 位持续升至 2026 年第 72 位，综合实力稳步增强，对文科考生也有一定吸引力；声誉平稳，无负面舆情；抖音热度一般，未出现报考关注度骤升信号；材料科学与工程 A、纺织科学与工程双一流，与文科招生专业（社会科学试验班、经济管理试验班、经济与贸易类、新闻传播学类、英语）无直接学科映射，但学校整体层次提升对文科专业有间 接带动。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学（社会科学试验班含法学）社会热度推荐但竞争分化；经济管理试验班/经济与贸易类对应金融/财经/经济类，社会热度分化观望；新闻传 播学类社会热度明显劝退；英语对应外语类，社会热度一般观望。河南省 2025 年历史类考生约 35.2 万人，2026 年全省总考生约 120 万，按历史比例估算历史类考生约 46 万，竞争显著加剧；东华大学位于上海，对河南文科考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在河南文科招生人数较少（10–20 人），属小规模招生，扩招后仍属中等偏低水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2026 年招生计划翻倍扩招（10→20 人）使位次后移、河南省历史类考生规模增加使竞争加剧、学校排名上升增强吸引力等因素，扩招效应显著大于竞争加剧效应，预计最低录取位次在 2025 年基准 3030 名基础上明显后移。预测 2026 年最低位次约 4748 名，区间 4248–5248 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2024–2025 minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) are approximately 3514→3030, with 2025 moving forward by about 484 places compared to 2024, showing a trend of intensified competition and forward movement under enrollment reduction; 2025 baseline is about 3030; enrollment plan for this university in Henan liberal arts (history category): 10 in 2024, 10 in 2025; 2026 plan significantly increases to 20, a 100% expansion compared to 2025, greatly alleviating competition pressure theoretically, causing a significant backward shift in minimum admission ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Donghua University is a 211 and Double First-Class university, with Soft Science ranking continuously rising from 81st in 2021 to 72nd in 2026, steadily enhancing comprehensive strength, which also attracts liberal arts candidates; reputation is stable with no negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is average, no sudden surge in application attention; Materials Science and Engineering A, Textile Science and Engineering Double First-Class, with no direct subject mapping to liberal arts enrollment majors (Social Science Experimental Class, Economics and Management Experimental Class, Economics and Trade Category, Journalism and Communication Category, English), but the overall improvement of the university indirectly boosts liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law (Social Science Experimental Class includes Law) has socially recommended popularity but competitive differentiation; Economics and Management Experimental Class/Economics and Trade Category corresponds to Finance/Economics/Economic categories, with socially differentiated and wait-and-see popularity; Journalism and Communication Category has socially obvious discouragement; English corresponds to Foreign Language category, with generally wait-and-see popularity. In 2025, Henan Province had about 352,000 history category candidates, and in 2026, total provincial candidates are about 1.2 million, with history category candidates estimated at about 460,000 by historical proportion, significantly intensifying competition; Donghua University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal to Henan liberal arts candidates; the university's enrollment in Henan liberal arts is small (10–20), still at a medium-low level after expansion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2026 enrollment plan doubling (10→20) causing a backward shift in ranking, the increase in Henan history category candidates intensifying competition, and the university's rising ranking enhancing appeal, the expansion effect significantly outweighs the competition intensification effect. The minimum admission ranking is expected to shift backward significantly from the 2025 baseline of 3030. Predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 4748, with a range of 4248–5248.

Journalism and Communication Category has socially obvious discouragement, so careful evaluation of employment prospects is needed when applying.
